partially wrapped in foil or paper

fillings aligned in a visible longitudinal trough
hard-shell variant with ruffled crispy corn rim

chopped onion and cilantro sprinkled directly on exposed filling
background: casual Mexican restaurant table with colorful tiles
backyard picnic table at a fiesta

action_or_pose: served in a disposable boat tray
clustered in a set of six or eight

browned crispy shell with molten interior
zigzag okonomi sauce stripes

aonori and dancing katsuobushi topping

mascarpone sabayon cream filling
unsweetened cocoa powder top dusting (no glaze)
clean, alternating light-cream and coffee-brown strata
marsala or rum-laced espresso soak in biscuits
